svg.title: Sanctum aperture
svg.desc: The Sanctum mark: a stroke-drawn aperture of two concentric rings and a center dot, ink #1A1A1E. The outer ring carries a small seam at 45 degrees, the suggestion of a vault door about to turn. Geometry is centered on (256,256); the outer arc runs from -39deg to -51deg the long way around (348deg sweep), leaving a 12deg seam whose rounded caps narrow it to a calm, deliberate gap.
